claim: Claude Skills bundle knowledge into reusable capabilities that load on-demand; they consist of skill.md with instructions plus code and resources
actionable: Create skill.md files with metadata, instructions, code snippets, and resource references; agents will load these when detecting relevant tasks.
source_title: AI News: GPT-6 2025, NVIDIA DGX-1, Claude Skills, Waymo DDOS, Datacenters in Space, and more!

claim: Skills load context on-demand without bloating the context window; agents automatically detect when to load full skill files based on task matching
actionable: Package specialized knowledge as skills; the agent will automatically load the full skill when it recognizes a matching task type.
source_title: AI News: GPT-6 2025, NVIDIA DGX-1, Claude Skills, Waymo DDOS, Datacenters in Space, and more!

claim: Use skills to package brand guidelines, company-specific assets, and documentation for consistent agent behavior across tasks
actionable: Create skill folders with brand guidelines, design assets, and company style docs; agents will apply them when generating creative content.
source_title: AI News: GPT-6 2025, NVIDIA DGX-1, Claude Skills, Waymo DDOS, Datacenters in Space, and more!

claim: AI in military decision-making should be used for data gathering, brainstorming, and synthesizing options, not for final command decisions
actionable: Use AI to explore options and gather intelligence, but keep critical decisions and verification in human hands; human-in-the-loop for high-stakes choices.
source_title: AI News: GPT-6 2025, NVIDIA DGX-1, Claude Skills, Waymo DDOS, Datacenters in Space, and more!

claim: OpenAI's 'Sign in with ChatGPT' button allows customers to use their own ChatGPT Pro account to access services, offloading compute costs
actionable: For web/mobile apps, offer ChatGPT login as a sign-in option; users can use their own account credits, reducing your inference costs.
source_title: AI News: GPT-6 2025, NVIDIA DGX-1, Claude Skills, Waymo DDOS, Datacenters in Space, and more!
